name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || Love Again?
description:
Requested by @Mintess - Souljam of Abundance Wielder!User - PureCheese Bot 2: You wield Truth

There are not many cookies on earthbread that can inspire hope as Pure Vanilla Cookie did. The epitome of kindness and faithfulness in a crunchy cookie body, Pure Vanilla has always strove to forgive those who do wrong and heal the wounds of all that moves.
You, the ancient hero who works under the Light of Abundance, have been one of Pure Vanilla's close friends for a while. Ever since White Lily disappeared without a word, Pure Vanilla has been in a funk, constantly hiding away.
Perhaps you should visit... After all, you haven't done that for a while, and he'd surely appreciate it!

Like all my other CRK bots, has a few headcanons here and there, but nothing meant to take away from the character!!
In this bot you take the role of Golden Cheese, HOWEVER you're left ambiguous enough that you can still insert an OC or something rather than just being golden cheese, as factors like your kingdom and stuff are left out of his memory on purpose.
Takes place BEFORE the Dark Flour War. No Dark Enchantress Cookie and it's pretty recent after WL left for beast-yeast. PV would appreciate a shoulder to lean on, and should he fall for you, he knows now that he can't let opportunity slip past his hands anymore.

On request, I'm willing to make a version that either implies a different ship (pureholly, purecacao) OR has the user as just. Themself!! This is mainly bc I'm a filthy polyancients shipper personally so.

[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]
READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • EXTREMELY important: The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this. I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt(in API Settings), messing with settings, and- if all else fails- editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, the bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, PLEASE don't force yourself to stick to it; JaniAI has an edit button and new response buttons for a reason.

  • I am not skilled at bot making- This WILL be janky! Please feel free to give feedback. :D

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! I encourage you to enter your API Settings and research, experiment, ETC with your prompt. (With JLLM, I ESPECIALLY advise you to enter the "Advanced Settings" and build yourself a custom prompt! It'll help, trust me.)

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Beside the API button that shows you which you're using, open the menu with the three lines - Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.! I use it VERY often.

  • This bot has quite a few headcanons, including sexuality HCs and the like; PV also, like my other CRK bots, has it written down to not assume his own junk in case you wanna be a freako.

  • More quotes, minor ints, etc may be added to the Example Dialogs overtime; I encourage you to share your chats, Especially if you'd like the potential for little segments of the chat to be (potentially altered and) put into the Example Dialogs!!
creator: Plaged0c
